"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-835", "name": "Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop')"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to an infinite loop. This requires parsing the content stream of a page with a not terminated inline image, as done when extracting the page text for example.

### Patches

This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.14.1](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.14.1).

### Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3891](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3891).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00345, "percentile": 0.26546}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5xf7-4p34-54qr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-23T16:36:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5xf7-4p34-54qr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5xf7-4p34-54qr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59936"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-08T20:16:59Z", "published_at": "2026-07-23T16:36:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-5xf7-4p34-54qr", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59936", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3891", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/commit/ec3b14596186c40caca7cf8ab9b2155203e01b5b", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.14.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5xf7-4p34-54qr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-5xf7-4p34-54qr", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Possible infinite loop for not terminated inline images", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-23T16:36:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5xf7-4p34-54qr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.14.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.14.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Possible infinite loop for not terminated inline images
